work_task_description: Design §5 substrate: rename Workstream phase Design->Architecture; expand WORKSTREAM_STATUSES to Planned->Scoping->Ready->In Progress->Complete|Not Applicable|Blocked with transitions; add needs_attention + needs_attention_reason to the Workstream model. Vocab + model + Alembic migration + tests; apply to live DB.
work_task_notes: Resume handoff: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/HANDOFF-WTK-001-ado-state-model-substrate.md (orientation + design §5 spec + migration specifics + close-out flow).
work_task_title: ADO state-model substrate: expand Workstream lifecycle + needs_attention flag + Architecture rename

work_task_description: Implement the ADO structural step (design §3.2.1 / §4.1): a decomposer that, given a Planning Item, creates every phase Workstream (Architecture, Development, Testing, Documentation, Data Migration, Deployment) in Planned status, wires each one's workstream_belongs_to_planning_item edge to the PI, and chains consecutive phases with serial blocked_by gates. Access-layer function repositories/decomposition.py + POST /planning-items/{id}/decompose endpoint. Once-only (409 if already decomposed); 404 for an unknown PI. Vocab/access/api + unit and API tests.
work_task_title: ADO structural decomposer — decompose a PI into its six phase Workstreams

work_task_description: Implement the tier-3 phase-specialist substrate (design §2.1/§3.2/§4.3): repositories/scoping.py with scope_workstream (atomically create the phase's Work Tasks with work_task_belongs_to_workstream edges and drive the Workstream Planned->Scoping->Ready, or Planned->Scoping->Not Applicable for an evaluated-empty phase) and prior_phase_outputs (the feed-forward read of earlier phases' Work Tasks). Endpoints POST /workstreams/{id}/scope and GET /workstreams/{id}/prior-phase-outputs. Access + API tests + an end-to-end integration test walking a PI decompose->scope->execute. The agent prompts themselves are §10 out-of-scope.
work_task_title: ADO phase-specialist substrate — scope_workstream + prior_phase_outputs

work_task_description: Read-only desktop monitoring panels for the new Workstream (WSK-) and Work Task (WTK-) entities under the Governance sidebar group, mirroring existing panels (projects.py, planning_items.py). Show identifier, phase_type/area, status, needs_attention (Workstream), claimed_by (Work Task), and related-edge context. Wire into the sidebar; add UI tests. Code only — no governance records, no db-export, no apply_close_out.
work_task_title: Workstream + Work Task UI monitoring panels (Governance sidebar)

work_task_description: The tier-2 PI Lead substrate (design §3.2-3.4): the deterministic gate + execution-loop primitives over the decomposed/scoped phases. Which phase scopes next; the §3.3 gate (all phases scoped Ready/Not Applicable); which Workstreams are executable now (Ready + all blocked_by predecessors terminal); start a phase (Ready->In Progress, ready its Work Tasks); verify+advance a phase (all Work Tasks Complete -> Workstream Complete); and the PI-resolution check (all phases terminal). Access + API + tests.
work_task_title: ADO PI Lead substrate — execution gate + phase advance

work_task_description: The tier-1 Project Manager substrate (design §2/§3.1): project_backlog (every PI in the Project with status, blocked_by deps + unresolved blockers, eligible flag, and the eligible/in_flight/blocked/resolved partitions + all_resolved), eligible_planning_items, and dispatch_planning_item (eligible PI -> In Progress). Endpoints GET /projects/{id}/backlog, GET /projects/{id}/eligible-planning-items, POST /planning-items/{id}/dispatch. Access + API tests incl. a full-org capstone (PM dispatch -> Lead -> execute -> resolve -> next PI unlocks).
work_task_title: ADO Project Manager substrate — dependency-aware PI backlog + dispatch

work_task_description: Specify the agent_profile entity (identity + role/specialization keyed to ADO tiers/phases/areas, prompt-seed description, status lifecycle, AGP- server-assigned identifier) under governance-schema-specs/, resolving the profile<->ADO-role coupling open question (PRD section 10.4).
work_task_title: Author the agent_profile (AGP-) governance entity schema spec

work_task_description: Specify the skill entity (two-kind instruction/tool taxonomy, I/O contract JSON schema and optional backing-callable pointer, independent versioning) as a shared reusable catalog item per PRD sections 4.2/7.2.
work_task_title: Author the skill (SKL-) governance entity schema spec

work_task_description: Specify the governance_rule entity (rule type, enforcement mode advisory/enforced/enforced_with_override, severity, body, structured predicate for enforced rules) as a shared reusable catalog item per PRD sections 4.3/5.
work_task_title: Author the governance_rule (GVR-) governance entity schema spec

work_task_description: Specify the two new reference-edge kinds (agent_profile_has_skill, agent_profile_governed_by_rule) with their (source,target) constraints for REFERENCE_RELATIONSHIPS/_kinds_for_pair/CHECK, plus the float/pin drift-assertion propagation semantics riding on the reference_book_versions precedent (PRD sections 3.3/3.4/6/7.4).
work_task_title: Design the binding reference-edge and float/pin propagation model

work_task_description: Specify how the access layer resolves a profile identifier into a contract (composed prompt + tool set + enforced ruleset + version stamp) and binds enforced rules onto existing access-layer enforcement vs. a broker, resolving the broker-scope open question (PRD sections 4-resolution/3.5/10.3/12).
work_task_title: Design the profile-to-contract resolver and hybrid-governance binding

work_task_description: Author the single Alembic migration onto head 0036 creating the agent_profile/skill/governance_rule tables, adding agent_profile_has_skill and agent_profile_governed_by_rule to the refs relationship_kind CHECK and the change_log entity-type CHECK, and registering both kinds in REFERENCE_RELATIONSHIPS and _kinds_for_pair.
work_task_title: Add Alembic migration (head 0036) for the three registry tables and two reference-edge kinds

work_task_description: Implement access-layer repositories for the three entities with server-assigned identifiers and binding-edge rules, plus the resolver that composes a profile identifier into a contract (prompt + tool set + enforced ruleset + version stamp), wiring enforced rules onto the existing access-layer enforcement rather than a broker.
work_task_title: Build the registry repositories and the profile-to-contract resolver

work_task_description: Add REST endpoints for agent_profile/skill/governance_rule and the profile-to-contract resolve endpoint under the {data,meta,errors} envelope, with record creation flowing through the API per governance-recording-rules.md.
work_task_title: Expose REST endpoints for the registry entities and the resolver

work_task_description: Surface the registry entities and the profile-to-contract resolver as MCP tools reusing the REST surface so MCP-connected agents can read profiles, skills, rules, and resolved contracts.
work_task_title: Add MCP tools for the registry and contract resolution

work_task_description: Add read-oriented PySide6 monitoring panels under the Governance sidebar group for agent_profile, skill, and governance_rule, consistent with the existing v0.7 governance-entity panels.
work_task_title: Add Governance-sidebar monitoring panels for the registry entities

work_task_description: Verify the migration creates the agent_profile/skill/governance_rule tables and that the refs relationship_kind CHECK and change_log entity-type CHECK accept the two new edge kinds (agent_profile_has_skill, agent_profile_governed_by_rule) and reject invalid ones.
work_task_title: Test the head-0036 migration and the two new reference-edge CHECK constraints

work_task_description: Cover server-assigned identifier allocation, binding-edge (source,target) rule enforcement for both edge kinds, and the resolver composing a profile into a contract (prompt + tool set + enforced ruleset + version stamp) including advisory-float vs enforced-bind rule handling.
work_task_title: Test the registry repositories and the profile-to-contract resolver

work_task_description: Cover CRUD round-trips for agent_profile/skill/governance_rule and the resolve endpoint under the {data,meta,errors} envelope, including optional-identifier POST, collision (409) and malformed (422) cases.
work_task_title: Test the registry REST endpoints and the resolve endpoint

work_task_description: Verify the new MCP tools register and that reading profiles/skills/rules and resolving a profile-to-contract through the MCP surface returns results consistent with the REST endpoints.
work_task_title: Test the registry and contract-resolution MCP tools

work_task_description: Document the v0.x release in CLAUDE.md — the three new governance entities (agent_profile/AGP, skill/SKL, governance_rule/GVR), Alembic head 0036, the profile-to-contract resolver, and the two new reference-edge kinds (agent_profile_has_skill, agent_profile_governed_by_rule) extending the reference-vocab and governance-entity notes.
work_task_title: Add the Agent Profile Registry release paragraph to CLAUDE.md

work_task_description: Add a built/status header to PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/agent-profile-registry/ PRD v0.2 and record the resolutions Architecture reached for the three open questions (broker scope, profile↔role coupling, WS-012 interaction).
work_task_title: Mark the Agent Profile Registry PRD as built and record the resolved open questions

work_task_description: Add agent_profile_has_skill and agent_profile_governed_by_rule to the Common relationship vocabulary in specifications/governance-recording-rules.md so the recording rules cover the new binding edges.
work_task_title: Register the two new registry reference-edge kinds in governance-recording-rules.md

work_task_description: Author a usage guide covering how an agent resolves a profile identifier into a contract (prompt + tool set + enforced ruleset + version stamp) via REST/MCP and how the two seeded profiles (Development Phase Specialist, Area Specialist) bind their tool-skills.
work_task_title: Write a how-to for resolving a profile into a contract and seeding profiles

work_task_description: Architecture-phase deliverable: pi-123-unified-db-architecture.md — D1-D11 design decisions (meta-fold, engagement_id discriminator, composite-identifier collision fix, central ContextVar routing rewrite, snapshot scoping, single Alembic chain, one-shot consolidation) and the six-phase decomposition.
work_task_title: Produce unified multi-engagement DB migration design + decomposition
